global_summary: This week's plan calls for 103 work-days across nine projects, 43 due by today but only 8 earned. Every project trailed last week (Jul 13-19). Push inspections and trims to close the 34-day gap.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Slip: 57%, with 9 of 21 expected work-days done and this week's single day unearned. Book the final building inspection, already due Mon Jul 20.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Slip: 71%, 4 of 14 expected work-days done and none of this week's 9 due days earned. Install gutters by Thu Jul 23, final inspection by Fri Jul 24.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind: 16 of 49 expected work-days done, 2 of 14 due this week earned. Install tiles by Sun Jul 26 to keep six tasks from slipping to August.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Slip: 37%, 30 of 49 expected work-days done and just 1 of 5 due this week earned. The second-floor paint change order already slipped to Wed Jul 29.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Slip: 37%, 29 of 52 expected work-days done and none of this week's 3 due earned. Insulation slipped to next week; roofing shingles still open.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Nearly on pace: 3 of 4 due days earned this week, +4 tasks since yesterday. Install baseboards and interior doors by Thu Jul 23, plumbing trim by Sat Jul 25.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Slip: 24%, 14 of 23 expected work-days done and none of this week's 3 due earned. Start tile install (no backsplash) by Fri Jul 24.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slip: 19%, best of the group with 71 of 90 expected work-days done. Start insulation by Fri Jul 24; siding already pushed to August.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Slip: 27%, 2 of 3 due days earned and +3 tasks since yesterday. Set rebar by Tue Jul 21, pre-pour inspection Wed Jul 22, concrete pour by Thu Jul 23.
